note: Re-scan held FRONTIER, 0 table-stakes gaps. Field saturated (~14 query angles) — still NO direct competitor: nothing else's primary job is Solana CU regression/budget GATING in CI. Strongest peer mollusk added an informational CU-delta bencher (no threshold gate, no attribution). bankrun deprecated -> stale-reference; surfpool is a new profiler entrant (CU+CPI inspection, no gate). Maturity strengthened vs last scan: v0.1->v0.2 publish, PR-comment integration, multi-sample variance->confidence, turnkey `bench` command, and a mutation+property test-hardening pass (zero surviving mutants in core/report; dense float-clause law sweep). Remaining upside is onboarding/optional, not table-stakes: ship the reusable GitHub Action (ROADMAP, no peer has one), smooth the Linux-executor turnkey friction, and optionally borrow EVM ideas (committed/diffable snapshot file, percentage --tolerance gate, distributional Min/Avg/Median/Max report).
